author: nathaniel bond
review: The staff is great, and the building I lived in (the Leopold building) was wonderful. Jena Curry and the rest managing the Leopold apartments were excellent. They were really quick to respond to whatever issues I had, and were happy to help

ownerResponse.text: Hi Nathaniel. We really appreciate the feedback! Thank you for choosing the Leopold Apartments and we hope you are doing well and staying healthy during this pandemic.

author: Rebecca Hall
review: Residential listings that range from the tiny unique to the custom lovely Leopold. Commercial spots to start your business throughout Whatcom County. Helpful office staff and maintenance.

author: Rena Priest
review: I rented from Daylight for 5 years. It was the best rental experience I've ever had. Whenever I needed anything at all, Daylight responded immediately. The building was safe and secure and clean. The neighbors were cool. The staff were

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Rena.  Congratulations on becoming a homeowner!  We so appreciated having you as a Tenant.

author: Courtney Rambo
review: Our office is located in the Bellingham National Bank Building - in the the roughly 3 years that we've been here, it's gone through a number of property managers. We've been working with Daylight for the past 6 months are so and have been

author: Simon Grant
review: I rented from Daylight Properties for 2 years, and they were responsive and accommodating all the way through, from move in to move out. Prices were fair and staff were friendly, I was given prompt communication about

ownerResponse.text: Thanks, Simon! It's great to hear of good experiences from our past tenants. We enjoyed renting to you and would love to have you back any time. Cheers!

author: Dana Christiansen
review: You make an error they charge you $50 but when they make an error and charge you too much it doesnt matter. And in fact say it is because you didnt put a limit on the automatic withdrawal so they can charge whatever they want. Awful!!!!
